actionUnits.condition: Goal: exercise AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter/OnTriggerExit on platform2 (1). Preconditions required by Unity physics: (1) platform2 (1) must have a trigger collider (BoxCollider.m_IsTrigger == 1); (2) at least one of the two colliders (platform or the entering object) must have a Rigidbody; (3) MonoBehaviour (id: 764083142, guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) field 'player' must reference the Player object; (4) Script logic currently checks 'if (gameObject == player)' so the event will never parent the player unless 'player' is set to this platform itself (which makes SetParent a no-op). Most likely intended was 'if (other.gameObject == player)'. Current scene state: Has_Rigidbody: False; BoxCollider.m_IsTrigger: 0; MonoBehaviour.player: null; no UnityEvent m_Calls configured; no public, parameterless methods available to manually invoke via Trigger. Therefore OnTriggerEnter/Exit cannot be triggered automatically nor manually with current configuration.
